title: AreaDifferentialTemperatureLoad
description: AreaDifferentialTemperatureLoad: Vertical differential temperature load for area elements such as Panels and FEMeshes.

TemperatureProfile.description: Vertical differential temperature profile of the area element expressed as a Dictionary of the normalised position from the bottom face of the surface property and the temperature at each increment. Property has a quantity of type Temperature measured in [K].

Loadcase.description: The Loadcase in which the load is applied. Loadcase: Basic load case class. All load classes need to point to one Loadcase.

Objects.description: The group of IAreaElements that the load should be applied to. For most analysis packages the objects added here need to be pulled from the analysis package before being assigned to the load.

Axis.description: Defines whether the load is applied in local or global coordinates.

Projected.description: If true the load is projected to the element. This means that the load will be reduced when its direction is at an angle to the element.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
